response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled full-stack and distributed systems engineer with a strong testing culture and broad polyglot background, but he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. The minimum bar of 8 years of C++ experience is not met — his resume shows roughly 6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments and a single C++ bachelor thesis project, with C++ absent from his listed skills. His primary languages are JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang. Additionally, the role demands 5+ years in large-scale cloud infrastructure and a formal technical leadership track in cloud or DevOps contexts, neither of which is evidenced in his work history.
strengths: Strong engineering discipline — consistent application of TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and pairing across multiple roles
Experience with high-throughput distributed systems at Dunnhumby, processing millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O and low-latency design
Active knowledge-sharer through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects, indicating genuine mentoring aptitude
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months at National Instruments) against an 8-year minimum requirement — this alone is disqualifying
No cloud compute platform ownership or formal cloud/DevOps technical leadership experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz and personal Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective do not meet the bar
Primary technical identity is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang full-stack and product engineering, not systems-level infrastructure or platform work
